# Prompt organization

Use one launcher prompt at workspace open, and keep reference notes separate from runnable prompts.

## Run first
- `00-workspace-start.prompt.md` — single entry point to choose setup/onboarding/direct work.

## Startup prompts
- `startup/10-matlab-paths.prompt.md` — MATLAB `addpath` bootstrap for this workspace and related repos.
- `startup/20-isetcam-onboarding.prompt.md` — targeted ISETCam learning prompt for core pipeline functions.

## Reference notes
- `reference/isetcam-core-pipeline.notes.md` — internal function notes used during onboarding and coding help.

## Naming convention
- Runnable prompts: `NN-topic.prompt.md`
- Informational notes: `topic.notes.md`
